languages.text: {n}Вознеся руки, Эоганн тихо произносит:{/n} "Ибо молвил Бог-Машина на всепостижимом бинарике: "Искажение замысла моего есмь ересь". Поддавшихся скверне собратьев следует истребить, прежде, чем они разнесут ее дальше".

{n}Eogunn speaks softly, raising his hands:{/n} "For thus spake the Machine God in the all-comprehending binharic: 'The distortion of My design is heresy.' The brethren who have succumbed to this blight must be utterly purged, before they spread the corruption further."
languages.original_text: {n}Вознеся руки, Эоганн тихо произносит:{/n} "Ибо молвил Бог-Машина на всепостижимом бинарике: "Искажение замысла моего есмь ересь". Поддавшихся скверне собратьев следует истребить, прежде, чем они разнесут ее дальше".

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn speaks softly, raising his hands:{/n} "For thus spake the Machine God in the all-comprehending binharic: 'The distortion of My design is heresy.' The brethren who have succumbed to this blight must be utterly purged, before they spread the corruption further."

{n}Eogunn speaks softly, raising his hands:{/n} "For thus spake the Deus Mechanicus in the all-comprehending binharic: 'The distortion of My design is heresy.' The brethren who have succumbed to this blight must be utterly purged, before they spread the corruption further."

{n}Eogunn speaks softly, raising his hands:{/n} "For thus spake the Deus Mechanicus in the all-comprehending binharic: 'The distortion of My design is heresy.' The brethren who have succumbed to this blight must be utterly purged, before they spread the corruption further."

{n}Eogunn speaks softly, raising his hands:{/n} "For thus spake the Deus Mechanicus in the all-comprehending binharic: 'The distortion of My design is heresy.' The brethren who have succumbed to this blight must be utterly purged, before they spread the corruption further."

{n}Eogunn speaks softly, raising his hands:{/n} "For thus spake the Machine God in the all-comprehending binharic: 'The distortion of My design is heresy.' The brethren who have succumbed to this blight must be utterly purged, before they spread the corruption further."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn habla con suavidad, levantando las manos:{/n} «Así habló el Dios Máquina en el binario, que todo lo comprende: "La distorsión de Mi diseño es herejía". Los hermanos que hayan sucumbido a esta plaga deben ser purgados sin excepción, antes de que puedan extender su corrupción».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn speaks softly, raising his hands:{/n} "For thus spake the Machine God in the all-comprehending binharic: 'The distortion of My design is heresy.' The brethren who have succumbed to this blight must be utterly purged, before they spread the corruption further."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn habla con suavidad, levantando las manos:{/n} «Así habló el Dios Máquina en el binario, que todo lo comprende: "La distorsión de Mi diseño es herejía". Los hermanos que hayan sucumbido a esta plaga deben ser purgados sin excepción, antes de que puedan extender su corrupción».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡缓缓举起双手，轻声说道：{/n}“因万机之神曾以那包罗万象的二进制圣言如此宣告：‘扭曲吾之设计，即为异端。’那些沦陷在这场灾厄中的同胞，必须被彻底净化，绝不能让腐化继续扩散。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn speaks softly, raising his hands:{/n} "For thus spake the Machine God in the all-comprehending binharic: 'The distortion of My design is heresy.' The brethren who have succumbed to this blight must be utterly purged, before they spread the corruption further."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡缓缓举起双手，轻声说道：{/n}“因万机之神曾以那包罗万象的二进制圣言如此宣告：‘扭曲吾之设计，即为异端。’那些沦陷在这场灾厄中的同胞，必须被彻底净化，绝不能让腐化继续扩散。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn spricht leise und hebt seine Hände:{/n} "Denn so sprach der Maschinengott in allumfassendem Binhärisch: 'Die Störung Meines Plans ist Ketzerei.' Die Brüder, die dieser Pest verfielen, müssen gänzlich gereinigt werden, ehe sie die Verderbnis weiter verbreiten."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn speaks softly, raising his hands:{/n} "For thus spake the Machine God in the all-comprehending binharic: 'The distortion of My design is heresy.' The brethren who have succumbed to this blight must be utterly purged, before they spread the corruption further."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn spricht leise und hebt seine Hände:{/n} "Denn so sprach der Maschinengott in allumfassendem Binhärisch: 'Die Störung Meines Plans ist Ketzerei.' Die Brüder, die dieser Pest verfielen, müssen gänzlich gereinigt werden, ehe sie die Verderbnis weiter verbreiten."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn s'exprime d'une voix douce, les mains levées :{/n} « Ainsi parla le Dieu-Machine dans la langue binhaire universelle : "Toute déformation de Mon dessein relève de l'hérésie." Les fidèles qui ont succombé à ce fléau doivent être littéralement purgés, avant que la corruption ne se propage davantage. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn speaks softly, raising his hands:{/n} "For thus spake the Machine God in the all-comprehending binharic: 'The distortion of My design is heresy.' The brethren who have succumbed to this blight must be utterly purged, before they spread the corruption further."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn s'exprime d'une voix douce, les mains levées :{/n} « Ainsi parla le Dieu-Machine dans la langue binhaire universelle : "Toute déformation de Mon dessein relève de l'hérésie." Les fidèles qui ont succombé à ce fléau doivent être littéralement purgés, avant que la corruption ne se propage davantage. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, ellerini kaldırarak yumuşak bir sesle konuşuyor.{/n} "Zira Makine Tanrı, her şeyi idrak eden ikilidilde şöyle buyurmuştur: 'Tasarımımın çarpıtılması kâfirliktir.' Bu illete yenik düşen kardeşler, yozlaşmayı daha fazla yaymadan önce tamamen arındırılmalıdır."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn speaks softly, raising his hands:{/n} "For thus spake the Machine God in the all-comprehending binharic: 'The distortion of My design is heresy.' The brethren who have succumbed to this blight must be utterly purged, before they spread the corruption further."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn, ellerini kaldırarak yumuşak bir sesle konuşuyor.{/n} "Zira Makine Tanrı, her şeyi idrak eden ikilidilde şöyle buyurmuştur: 'Tasarımımın çarpıtılması kâfirliktir.' Bu illete yenik düşen kardeşler, yozlaşmayı daha fazla yaymadan önce tamamen arındırılmalıdır."

languages.text:
{n}エオグンは静かに語りかける。両手を挙げて。{/n}
「機械神は全知全能の二進法でこう言った。
『私の設計の歪みは異端である』
この腐敗に屈した兄弟たちは、腐敗がさらに広がる前に完全に浄められるべきだ。」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn speaks softly, raising his hands:{/n} "For thus spake the Machine God in the all-comprehending binharic: 'The distortion of My design is heresy.' The brethren who have succumbed to this blight must be utterly purged, before they spread the corruption further."

この腐敗に屈した兄弟たちは、腐敗がさらに広がる前に完全に浄められるべきだ。」
